summary: Behavioral Pattern AI system testing complete. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED for GET /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/behavior-pattern endpoint. Frontend: BehaviorCard component renders correctly with all required elements (Brain icon, title, status badge, risk score, risk reason, baseline chart, anomalies list). Device Health page integration working - both MetricTrendsCard and BehaviorCard display side by side when device row expanded.

backend.test_returns_correct_json_structure: PASS - device_id, device_identifier, current_risk, last_heartbeat, inactivity_minutes, baseline_profile, recent_anomalies, total_anomalies_in_window all present
backend.test_current_risk_structure: PASS - score (0-1), status (normal/mild/moderate/critical), reason all present
backend.test_baseline_profile_structure: PASS - array with hour, avg_movement, avg_interaction_rate, sample_count
backend.test_recent_anomalies_structure: PASS - behavior_score, anomaly_type, reason, created_at all present

frontend.baseline_chart: PASS - 24H ACTIVITY BASELINE bar chart visible
frontend.anomaly_items: PASS - 3 Extended Inactivity anomalies with scores
frontend.device_row_expansion: PASS - Clicking DEV-001 row expands with cards
frontend.side_by_side_layout: PASS - MetricTrendsCard and BehaviorCard in 2-column grid
frontend.existing_features_work: PASS - Table sorting, Anomaly Intelligence sections all work

critical_code_review_comments: Backend behavior-pattern endpoint correctly returns JSON with current_risk (score 0-1, status, reason), baseline_profile (24h hourly data), recent_anomalies
Anomaly types correctly defined: extended_inactivity, low_interaction, movement_drop, unusual_movement, hyperactivity, routine_break
Frontend BehaviorCard correctly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive/informational elements
Status badge colors implemented correctly: Normal=emerald, Mild=amber, Moderate=orange, Critical=red
24h Activity Baseline uses Recharts BarChart component
Recent Anomalies list shows anomaly type labels with score badges
Device Health page grid layout correctly shows MetricTrendsCard AND BehaviorCard side by side
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing DEV-001 device with behavior anomalies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Behavior Pattern AI feature fully tested. Backend GET /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/behavior-pattern?window_hours=X returns behavioral baseline, anomalies, and risk score. Response: device_id, device_identifier, current_risk{score, status, reason}, last_heartbeat, inactivity_minutes, current_hour_baseline, baseline_profile[{hour, avg_movement, avg_interaction_rate, sample_count}], recent_anomalies[{behavior_score, anomaly_type, reason, created_at}], total_anomalies_in_window. Frontend BehaviorCard renders in Device Health page expanded row alongside MetricTrendsCard. DEV-001 (ce4b5463-5a7e-46a5-8bbf-365dcfb3daeb) has behavior anomalies and baseline data for testing.
